content.en:
Hongmeng Ziguang was taken away by Ye Tian, and the other half-step sixfold ancestors also went back one by one, and they didn't even dare to fight Hongmeng Ziguang's idea, after all, Ye Tian was really terrible!

Even Changbai Daozu is not Ye Tian's opponent, who dares to fight Hongmeng Ziguang's idea?

And the news of Ye Tian's defeat of Changbai Dao Ancestor also spread, and even spread to other high-level origin domains.

Some Primordial Ancestors didn't believe it, but as time passed, the Changbai High Primordial Domain didn't seem to refute it, so many Primordial Ancestors began to believe it.

......

Swire Daomeng.

The projections of the Sixfold Ancestors gathered here to discuss something.

Soon after, the discussion ended, and suddenly a Sixfold Ancestor mentioned the matter of Changbai Dao Ancestor.

"Changbai Dao Ancestor, I heard that you were defeated by a half-step Sixfold Ancestor?" the Sixfold Ancestor sneered.

"Yes, the other party is indeed very demonic, he has comprehended three hundred and sixty-five extreme extreme paths, and has comprehended several supreme natal primordial control techniques, the foundation is extremely deep, and at least more than a hundred kinds of will clones have been fused, and his strength is no less than that of the Sixfold Primordial Ancestor!"

"With the supreme natal primordial control technique, three hundred and sixty-five extreme extreme paths, this kind of demon is indeed terrifying, and it also integrates more than a hundred extreme extreme paths, it is indeed comparable to the sixfold original ancestor, and it is normal for the Changbai Dao Ancestor to be defeated! It's a pity that the Ancient Dao Ancestor didn't fuse the three hundred and sixty-five extreme extreme paths, it's too difficult!"

"The Ancient Dao Ancestor has been away from the Ancient Plains for a long time, and now I don't know how far he has grown!"

"Maybe you've already achieved the Sevenfold Ancestor, right?"

"Sevenfold Ancestor, it's too difficult, I don't think it's very likely!"

"Or do you want to talk about the Endless Saint Ancestor who defeated the Changbai Dao Ancestor, do you want to recruit him into the Ancient Dao Alliance? After all, with his current strength, it is enough to be comparable to the Sixfold Origin Ancestor!"

"No, no matter how strong his strength is, it is also a half-step sixfold ancestor, not a real sixfold ancestor, the Taigu Dao Alliance only accepts the sixfold ancestor, otherwise the rules will be broken!"

"That's right, unless he breaks through to the Sixfold Ancestor, he is not qualified to become a member of the Ancient Dao Alliance!"

These Sixfold Ancestors only discussed for a while, and then dispersed one by one.

......

"One hundred and ninety-seven will clones have fused, it's really not easy!"

Ye Tian exhaled lightly.

Difficult!

It's so hard!

He now has to fuse one more clone of will, and it will have to be dozens of times before there is hope.

This is him, if he is replaced by other half-step sixfold ancestors, it is impossible to do it!

Even if the potential is the same as his, but he doesn't copy the body, every time it is a damage, after countless injuries, the foundation will inevitably not be able to continue to move forward, and can only be forced to impact the Sixfold Ancestor, unable to break through in the most perfect state.

Of course, if you get countless treasures that help slash the Will Pagoda and fuse the Will Clone, it won't be necessarily.

However, even if there were such treasures in the Primeval Realm, the number would not be too many, and it would not necessarily be useful to the half-step sixfold ancestor who had already fused nearly two hundred will clones.

"In the future, every time you fuse a will clone, it will take a lot of time and resources, and the resources prepared just to copy the body over the years have consumed a lot, and there is a shortage of resources!" Ye Tian muttered.

Fortunately, he is now the number one powerhouse in the Upper Spirit Origin Domain, so he can occupy a lot of treasure land, and if he collects them one by one, the resources are still barely enough, but if he breaks through to the Sixfold Origin Ancestor, the resources of a high-level Origin Domain may not be enough!

"It's no wonder that Changbai Dao Ancestor rarely stays in the Changbai High Origin Domain, and it seems that he is also short of resources!"

Ye Tian thought to himself.

He has a few copy bodies, and it is boring to stay in this area of the Upper Spirit Origin Domain all the time, so it is better to go to other high-level origin regions to take a look, and collect some resources by the way!

So on this day, Ye Tian sent a copy body to leave the Upper Spirit Origin Domain area.

There are a total of ninety-three high-level primordial domains in the primordial realm, and each high-level primordial domain represents a region, and the upper spirit primordial domain is weak and resource-barren.

The strength of the Changbai High Origin Domain is good, quite powerful, but it is not the most powerful High Origin Domain, and it can't even enter the top ten.

this day.

Ye Tian came to the Xuangu High Origin Domain, which was one of the top High Origin Domains, which was enough to rank in the top ten of the Ancient High Origin Domain.

According to Ye Tian's understanding, this high origin domain gave birth to seven sixfold ancestors, three of which have disappeared for many years, and I don't know if they have fallen or gone to other places.

At present, only the four Sixfold Ancestors who guard the Xuangu High Origin Domain and occasionally show up.

But even so, the Xuan Gu High Origin Domain was also extremely powerful.

"There are quite a few half-step sixfold ancestors in the Xuangu High Origin Domain!"

Ye Tian sighed.

The number of half-step sixfold primordial ancestors far surpassed that of the Shangling Primordial Domain, but when he thought of the background of the Xuangu High Primordial Domain, it was normal.

If the Upper Spirit Origin Domain also has several Sixfold Primordial Ancestors, after countless years, it can also cultivate a lot of half-step Sixfold Primordial Ancestors.

Ye Tian was constantly searching for some treasure land in the Xuangu High Origin Domain, and if it was an ownerless treasure land, and it was helpful to him, he would take its resources away.

However, after looking around, it is too rare to find a treasure place that is useful to him, and occasionally finding one, several resources that are useful to him are born, which are of little use.

Of course, there are a lot of ordinary resources collected.

He also wants these ordinary resources, although they can't be used to improve their strength, but if they copy their bodies, they can be used as energy to replenish.

this day.

When Ye Tian passed by a medium origin domain, he suddenly sensed the talent of a cultivator with his copying talent, and he was really shocked by the talent of the other party.

"There are actually thirty-six kinds of Extreme Dao Ancestral !!"

Ye Tian was surprised.

What does this mean, he knows very well, the other party can easily comprehend the thirty-six extreme extreme paths, and it is absolutely easy to become a holy son in the future.

The key is that there is one more Extreme Dao Ancestral Endowment, and there will be more potential!

With thirty-six Extreme Dao Ancestral Endowments, its potential is so high!

The strongest Saint Son he had ever seen before, and his Extreme Dao Ancestral Endowment was only seven or eight kinds, and comprehending the other Extreme Extreme Paths relied on countless time and resources.

"Han Xuan!"

Ye Tian muttered her name for a while, pondered for a while, and prepared to pay attention to this cultivator named Han Xuan.

Possessing thirty-six kinds of demons with Extreme Dao Ancestral Endowments is too rare, even he can't create them!

Although he could use the Copying Talent to give the Extreme Dao Ancestor Endowment to others, he had tried, and he could only give a cultivator a maximum of nine Extreme Dao Ancestral Endowments.

His relatives all contain nine kinds of Extreme Dao Ancestral Endowments, and no more than one of them is possible, because the soul can't bear the ten Extreme Dao Ancestral Endowments.

After all, this is an acquired gift, not a congenital birth, and it is naturally impossible to go against the sky!

The reason why he fused so many Extreme Dao Ancestral Endowments was because he had the talent for replication, and every time he fused, it was a transformation of the soul will, which could be fused without restrictions.
